data_sources.state_gdp_per_capita: MoSPI State GDP estimates 2022-23, current prices; Telangana ranks among top 5 in per-capita GSDP
data_sources.state_informal_economy_share: NSSO PLFS 2022-23, estimated; Hyderabad IT corridor raises formal share but rural Telangana remains heavily informal
data_sources.ruling_party_trust_index: Estimated from Lokniti-CSDS post-2023 Telangana election survey; Congress government replacing BRS
data_sources.political_contestation_index: ECI 2023 Telangana Assembly election data; 0.75 reflects evolving politics in new state (formed 2014), three-way contest between Congress, BRS, and BJP
data_sources.language_network_multiplier: 0.88 reflects Telugu-Urdu bilingual zone in Hyderabad, with Hindi and English also prevalent in IT corridors
data_sources.media_penetration: BARC India 2023 (tv), IRS 2022 (print), IAMAI-Kantar 2023 (digital), RAM Ratings 2022 (radio)
data_sources.union_legal_framework: Telangana Industrial Disputes framework assessed as moderate
data_sources.examination_board: Both Telangana State Board (TSBIE/BSETS) and CBSE operate
